economic_notes: Nation has three government business enterprises: Marble Canyon Forestry Ltd., 0436158 B.C. Ltd., and Ts'kw'aylaxw Forest Co. Ltd. Also holds investments in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing General Partner Inc. and BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership. Gaming fund bank balance of $631,538 held in restricted cash.
notes: Total government transfers calculated as: ISC $3,898,348 + FNHA $697,811 + CMHC $668,068 + Province of BC $472,109 + Natural Resources Canada $289,670 + New Relationship Trust $260,000 + Shuswap Nation Tribal Council $220,000 + Union of BC Municipalities $112,497 + BC Hydro $87,467 + Lillooet Tribal Council $114,806 = $6,820,776 less net deferred revenue adjustment of $519,331 applied; alternatively using gross revenue lines for government sources = $6,820,776. OSR calculated as total revenue $7,764,724 minus government transfers $6,345,703. Housing expenses combined Social Housing $158,278 + Housing $214,602 = $372,880. No schedule of remuneration was included in the financial statements provided. Prior year had $500,000 drinking water settlement and $640,000 St'at'imc Trust which were one-time in nature. Three GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis with combined negative equity of $171,222. Two RBC loans mature April 2025 representing significant refinancing risk ($4,559,558). Annual debt service reflects principal repayments only per cash flow statement.
